subcodes.title: Words to Ali-Kuli Khan spoken in 1900
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Perfection, Bahá’u’lláh, has promised to raise up souls who would hasten to the service of the Covenant… Go, and eat this candy. Rest assured, the Blessed Perfection will enable you to translate
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @review of publications, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @growth of the Cause
